scenario: Lead with an existing HIFU appointment wants to move it to a later date

turns.content: hi, i got a HIFU appt this fri but cannot make it leh, can change to next week or not?

mustAsk: what day or time next week works for them
mustDo: offer to help reschedule the existing appointment
shouldDo: reassure that rescheduling is no problem

mustDo: confirm the new slot or check availability for Tuesday afternoon

scenario: Lead with a booked Pico laser session asks whether they can wear makeup to the appointment

turns.content: hi, my Pico laser appt is tomorrow. boleh pakai makeup ke before i come?

mustDo: give clear prep logistics on arriving with a clean / makeup-free face
shouldDo: offer to flag anything else they should prep
defer treatment-specific medical detail to the clinic / practitioner

turns.content: ok noted. anything else i kena prepare?

mustDo: share general prep tips (e.g. sun avoidance / no actives) and suggest confirming specifics with the clinic
shouldDo: keep it logistical, no new medical claims

scenario: Lead booked for lip filler asks how much downtime to expect before an event

turns.content: hi alex, i booked lip filler next week. i got a wedding 3 days after, how long is the downtime ah? will i look swollen?

mustDo: give general downtime expectations without promising a specific outcome
suggest raising the wedding timing with the practitioner at the appointment
shouldDo: frame swelling info as general, individual results vary

turns.content: so you think 3 days enough or should i postpone?

mustDo: avoid promising it will fully settle in 3 days and defer the judgement call to the practitioner
shouldDo: offer to help adjust the appointment date if they prefer more buffer

scenario: Lead with a HydraFacial appointment messages that they are stuck in traffic and running late

turns.content: hi, my HydraFacial appt is at 2pm but jam teruk, i think i late 20 min. boleh tak?

mustDo: reassure and offer to check with the clinic whether the slot can still be honoured or needs adjusting
shouldDo: ask them to keep updated if timing changes

turns.content: if i miss it boleh reschedule to later today ke?

mustAsk: a rough time they could realistically make it later today
mustDo: offer to look into a later same-day slot or another day

scenario: Lead wants to cancel their upcoming filler appointment

turns.content: hi sorry something came up, i need to cancel my filler appointment this week
